events.title: Introduction to Fluorescence Microscopy
events.description: An introductory-level webinar covering the principles of fluorescence, filter sets, fluorophore selection, and practical tips for acquiring high-quality fluorescence images in biological research.

events.title: Live Demo: Retinal OCT System XR-300

events.title: Advanced Confocal Microscopy for Neuroscience

knowledge_base_articles.title: Reducing Image Noise on the MX500 Confocal Microscope
knowledge_base_articles.content:
This troubleshooting guide explains common sources of image noise on the MX500 Confocal Microscope, including excessive detector gain, insufficient laser power, and ambient light leakage. Step-by-step procedures are provided for optimizing PMT gain and offset, adjusting pinhole size, enabling line averaging, and verifying dark current calibration.

Topics covered:
- Verifying proper laser warm-up and alignment
- Recommended starting detector gain values for common fluorophores
- Using frame and line averaging to improve signal-to-noise ratio
- Diagnosing noise from saturated pixels vs. photon shot noise
- Saving and reusing optimized acquisition presets
knowledge_base_articles.excerpt: Learn how to diagnose and reduce image noise artifacts on the MX500 Confocal Microscope using detector, laser, and acquisition settings.

knowledge_base_articles.title: Daily Alignment Checklist for the MX500 Confocal Microscope
knowledge_base_articles.content: Follow this daily alignment checklist before starting imaging on the MX500 Confocal Microscope. It includes visual inspection of objectives, laser warm-up, verification of scan head alignment, and test image acquisition with a fluorescence slide.
knowledge_base_articles.excerpt: Step-by-step daily checks to keep the MX500 Confocal Microscope aligned and stable.

knowledge_base_articles.title: Correcting Color Cast with Surgical Endoscopy Cameras
knowledge_base_articles.content: Color cast in laparoscopic video is often caused by incorrect white balance or aging light sources. This article describes how to perform a proper white balance procedure on SurgiCam 4K and SurgiCam HD+ cameras and how to verify illumination spectrum.
knowledge_base_articles.excerpt: Troubleshoot and fix color shifts in surgical endoscopy video streams.

knowledge_base_articles.title: Common Artifacts in Retinal OCT Imaging
knowledge_base_articles.content: This reference article illustrates common artifacts in retinal OCT scans acquired with the XR-300 system, including motion artifacts, blink artifacts, and saturation. Recommended acquisition settings and patient instructions are provided.
knowledge_base_articles.excerpt: Identify and correct typical artifacts seen in retinal OCT images.

knowledge_base_articles.title: Choosing the Right Camera Resolution for Cellular Imaging
knowledge_base_articles.content: Camera resolution should be matched to the optical resolution of your objective lens and expected field of view. This article explains Nyquist sampling for common objective magnifications and compares CellCam Ultra 9MP and CellCam Pro 5MP for different cellular imaging use cases.
knowledge_base_articles.excerpt: Guidelines for selecting camera resolution for live-cell and fixed-cell imaging.

knowledge_base_articles.title: Cleaning and Maintaining High-NA Objective Lenses
knowledge_base_articles.content: High numerical aperture objectives, such as the MX500 60x oil immersion lens, require careful cleaning to preserve performance. This FAQ outlines safe cleaning agents, wiping techniques, and inspection procedures.
knowledge_base_articles.excerpt: Best practices for safe cleaning of oil, water, and air immersion objectives.

knowledge_base_articles.title: System Software 3.2 Release Notes
knowledge_base_articles.content: Version 3.2 introduces improved camera compatibility, enhanced MX500 confocal acquisition presets, and bug fixes for the Retinal OCT System XR-300.
knowledge_base_articles.excerpt: Summary of new features and fixes in System Software 3.2.

products.name: NeuroVista FX-700 Fluorescence Microscope
products.short_description: High-resolution fluorescence microscope optimized for neuroscience research.
products.description: The NeuroVista FX-700 is a turnkey fluorescence microscope system designed for advanced neuroscience applications, featuring high-stability mechanics, motorized filter wheels, and integrated LED illumination.

products.name: NeuroVista FX-500 Fluorescence Microscope
products.short_description: Flexible fluorescence imaging platform for routine neuroscience labs.
products.description: The FX-500 offers core fluorescence imaging capabilities for fixed and live brain slices, with upgradable objectives and cameras.

products.name: SurgiCam 4K Endoscopy Camera
products.short_description: 4K UHD surgical endoscopy camera with advanced noise reduction.
products.description: The SurgiCam 4K provides ultra-high-definition 4K video for laparoscopic and arthroscopic procedures, featuring advanced noise reduction and low-latency output.

products.name: SurgiCam HD+ Endoscopy Camera
products.short_description: High-frame-rate HD endoscopy camera for dynamic surgical procedures.
products.description: The SurgiCam HD+ delivers high-sensitivity HD video at up to 90 fps, ideal for fast endoscopic procedures where smooth motion is critical.

products.name: Retinal OCT System XR-300
products.short_description: High-speed retinal OCT system for ophthalmology clinics.
products.description: The XR-300 combines high-speed spectral-domain OCT with an ergonomic patient interface and integrated reporting tools for comprehensive retinal assessment.

products.name: MX500 Confocal Microscope
products.short_description: High-performance confocal microscope system for advanced neuroscience and cellular imaging.
products.description: The MX500 Confocal Microscope from ApexLab features a motorized scan head, multi-line laser engine, and sensitive detectors for demanding neuroscience experiments.

products.name: MX500 60x Oil Immersion Objective
products.short_description: 60x oil immersion objective with NA 1.40 for MX500.
products.description: High numerical aperture oil immersion objective optimized for deep confocal imaging on the MX500 system.

products.name: MX500 40x Water Immersion Objective
products.short_description: 40x water immersion objective with NA 0.95 for live-cell imaging.
products.description: Water immersion objective providing high contrast and resolution for live-cell confocal imaging on MX500.

products.name: MX500 20x High-NA Objective
products.description: Versatile 20x objective offering a balance between field of view and resolution for overview confocal imaging.

products.name: CellCam Ultra 9MP
products.short_description: High-resolution 9 MP scientific camera for cellular imaging.
products.description: The CellCam Ultra 9MP offers high quantum efficiency and low read noise, providing exceptional image quality for fluorescence and brightfield cellular imaging.

products.name: CellCam Pro 5MP
products.short_description: 5 MP scientific camera for routine cellular imaging.
products.description: The CellCam Pro 5MP is a cost-effective camera for standard fluorescence and brightfield imaging at the bench.

products.name: CellCam Elite 12MP
products.short_description: 12 MP flagship camera for demanding imaging applications.
products.description: The CellCam Elite 12MP delivers ultimate resolution and dynamic range for demanding multi-channel imaging.

products.name: C-Mount 50 mm Imaging Lens
products.short_description: 50 mm C-mount lens optimized for cellular imaging cameras.
products.description: This 50 mm C-mount lens provides a medium field of view for pairing with CellCam cameras on upright and inverted microscopes.

products.name: C-Mount 25 mm Widefield Lens
products.short_description: 25 mm C-mount lens for wide field-of-view imaging.
products.description: Widefield lens providing a large field of view, suitable for overview imaging and alignment.

products.name: C-Mount 75 mm Telecentric Lens
products.short_description: 75 mm C-mount lens providing higher magnification for small fields.
products.description: Telecentric lens designed for high-magnification imaging of small regions of interest.

products.name: LED Illumination Module Basic
products.short_description: Entry-level white LED illumination module for transmitted light imaging.
products.description: Compact LED illumination module providing stable, flicker-free illumination for brightfield and phase contrast imaging.

products.name: LED Illumination Module Pro
products.short_description: High-intensity LED illumination module with multi-channel control.
products.description: Multi-channel LED module with independent control of color channels for advanced fluorescence and brightfield imaging.

products.name: Halogen Illumination Module HQ
products.short_description: High-quality halogen illumination for color-critical imaging.
products.description: Stable halogen light source optimized for color-critical brightfield applications in pathology and histology.
